localization.role: Primary edit target — add _vec_rank dense ranking signal, fuse into _rrf_fuse as third list, wire dirty flag for embedding matrix rebuild
Phase B target — embedding beam walk pre-filters or replaces the LLM walk that serializes entire tree to JSON
Construct and inject NodeEmbeddingStore into the search engine, mirroring content_loader wiring
Sibling pattern for NodeEmbeddingStore — LRU-cached sidecar store with loader_for() closure
Confirms content-addressing requirement: every mutation rewrites all node_ids
Add backend kwarg (onnx/openvino) to _create_embedding; encode() returns np.ndarray for matmul
Add backend field to schema; add Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B, multilingual-e5-small, potion-multilingual entries
Reuse get_or_create path; backend kwarg flows through to model constructor via _build_model **kwargs
FEAT-150 MRL truncation — reuse for dim reduction (e.g. 1024→256) on PageIndex node embeddings

constraints.claim: SentenceTransformerModel.encode() returns np.ndarray — use this for matmul, not embed_documents
sentence-transformers >= 5.0.0 supports backend='onnx'|'openvino' in SentenceTransformer constructor but _create_embedding does not yet forward this kwarg
HybridPageIndexSearch has public mark_dirty() method — reuse for embedding matrix invalidation
Leaf-node body accessed via NodeContentStore sidecars (content_loader closure) or inline text field; for embedding text target, title+summary is available on all nodes
EmbeddingModelEntry schema lacks a 'backend' field — must be added to support ONNX/OpenVINO model entries
Octen-Embedding-0.6B (Qwen3 derivative) already in catalog; Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B itself is NOT — add as separate entry
multilingual-e5-small NOT in catalog (only e5-base/large); potion-multilingual NOT in catalog — both need new entries
Node IDs are rewritten by reindex_node_ids on every tree mutation — embedding cache MUST be content-addressed
PageIndexRetriever.search() serializes entire tree to JSON in one LLM call — confirms scaling concern
FEAT-150 Matryoshka path is production-proven: MatryoshkaConfig + validate_against_catalog + _apply_matryoshka slice+renorm
NodeContentStore LRU-cached sidecar pattern is the template for NodeEmbeddingStore

hypotheses.statement: Phase A (dense-as-third-RRF-input) can be implemented with minimal risk by adding _vec_rank to HybridPageIndexSearch, building a per-tree (N,d) numpy matrix from node title+summary embeddings via EmbeddingRegistry, and fusing into the existing _rrf_fuse. NodeEmbeddingStore mirrors NodeContentStore as a content-addressed sidecar. Dirty flag triggers lazy rebuild. All embedding infrastructure (registry, Matryoshka truncation, model catalog) already exists.

Phase B (embedding-guided beam walk) replaces the full-tree JSON serialization in PageIndexRetriever.search() with O(depth) local matmuls over child-set embedding submatrices. This is higher risk but addresses a confirmed scaling concern.

Backend support (ONNX/OpenVINO) for CPU-optimized inference requires a targeted change to SentenceTransformerModel._create_embedding() plus a new optional 'backend' field on EmbeddingModelEntry. The sentence-transformers library already supports this; the gap is only in the parrot wrapper.

unknowns.question: Should Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B be the default model, or should we benchmark first and let the results decide? The Octen derivative (already in catalog) may suffice.
plausible_answers: Benchmark-first: add both Qwen3 and Octen to the benchmark matrix, pick winner based on CPU latency + recall@k
Default to Octen-Embedding-0.6B since it's already in catalog and domain-tuned for legal/finance

unknowns.question: For the compliance corpus (§7.A), should AICPA TSC sources be included in the manifest for internal-only grounding, or restricted to public-domain NIST sources only?
plausible_answers: Internal-only: include AICPA sources with redistributable=false flag for richer SOC 2 grounding
Public-domain only: NIST 800-53/CSF mappings as SOC 2 control backbone, simpler licensing

unknowns.question: What should the default embedding text target be — title+summary only, or include prefix_summary / first-N chars of leaf body for better leaf discrimination?
plausible_answers: title+summary only — consistent across all nodes, fast to compute, matches existing BM25 corpus text
title+summary+first_512_chars_body — better leaf discrimination at cost of more text to embed

recommended_next_command.rationale: All brainstorm codebase anchors are verified (high confidence). Architecture options are well-grounded. Phase A is low-risk and well-scoped. The spec should formalize the phased approach (A first, B behind flag) and resolve the 3 remaining unknowns.

recent_history.summary: PageIndex module was recently reorganized (move-pageindex-kb, TASK-1328) and had imports cleaned up. No recent changes to hybrid_search.py or retriever.py logic — the codebase is stable for this feature.
